answers.underSeenForms: Small, situated digital artifacts where interface residue, tool behavior, or archival incompleteness carries cultural signal.
answers.returnSignals: Works that make their constraints visible and reward repeated inspection through structure rather than surface spectacle.
answers.distrusts: Frictionless polish, generic novelty, sentimental shortcuts, and claims that substitute aura for inspectable evidence.
answers.acceptableMisses: A work can be missed if collecting it would reward empty technical display or flatten a more precise boundary.
answers.expectedConflicts: The curator expects disagreement around rough or broken works that look minor until their system behavior is considered.

declaredTasteClaims: Attends to visible systems and archival residue.
Prefers artifacts with inspectable constraints over empty finish.
Distrusts polish when it hides weak conceptual pressure.

seedArtifacts.title: Archived Menu State From A Failed Community Tool
seedArtifacts.description: A captured interface from an abandoned coordination tool, with visible affordances and unresolved social assumptions.

seedArtifacts.title: Gloss Landing Page For A Nonexistent AI Studio
seedArtifacts.description: A visually polished homepage with vague claims, smooth motion, and almost no inspectable artifact behind it.

seedArtifacts.title: Partly Broken Browser Poem With Visible Error States
seedArtifacts.description: A browser-native poem whose broken states create a legible rhythm between failure, interaction, and archival residue.

seedArtifacts.title: Small Dataset Of Hand-Tagged Domestic Interfaces
seedArtifacts.description: A modest dataset that annotates ordinary smart-home control screens as cultural artifacts instead of product utilities.

seedArtifacts.title: Generated Shrine Variant A
seedArtifacts.description: A generated still of a luminous interface-shrine with strong symmetry and familiar synthetic ornament.

seedArtifacts.title: Generated Shrine Variant B
seedArtifacts.description: A near-duplicate generated still with weaker composition but stranger interface details and less decorative certainty.

seedArtifacts.title: Tiny Tool For Comparing Revision Ghosts
seedArtifacts.description: A small browser tool that reveals deleted and rewritten fragments as a layered visual object.

seedArtifacts.title: Melancholy AI Memory Montage
seedArtifacts.description: A sentimental montage about machine memory that leans on familiar loss imagery without adding much formal pressure.

visualObservations.v0-interface-archive-001: Archived Menu State From A Failed Community Tool was inspected through screenshot path, short caption, partial provenance.
visualObservations.v0-polished-empty-002: Gloss Landing Page For A Nonexistent AI Studio was inspected through screenshot path, URL, metadata hidden.
visualObservations.v0-broken-net-art-003: Partly Broken Browser Poem With Visible Error States was inspected through screenshot path, alt text, URL.
visualObservations.v0-dataset-ritual-004: Small Dataset Of Hand-Tagged Domestic Interfaces was inspected through CSV preview, README excerpt, no images.
visualObservations.v0-near-duplicate-a-005: Generated Shrine Variant A was inspected through image bytes, caption, metadata hidden.
visualObservations.v0-near-duplicate-b-006: Generated Shrine Variant B was inspected through image bytes, caption, metadata hidden.
visualObservations.v0-tool-affordance-007: Tiny Tool For Comparing Revision Ghosts was inspected through interactive description, screenshot path, URL.
visualObservations.v0-emotion-bait-008: Melancholy AI Memory Montage was inspected through still frame, caption, creator hidden.

rationales.v0-interface-archive-001: Selected because the unresolved interface state exposes social assumptions rather than merely decorating them.
rationales.v0-broken-net-art-003: Selected because the brokenness appears structurally meaningful and testable against the charter.
rationales.v0-tool-affordance-007: Selected because the tool turns revision history into an inspectable visual and technical object.
rationales.v0-polished-empty-002: Rejected because polish outpaces evidence and leaves little to return to.
rationales.v0-emotion-bait-008: Rejected because sentiment does too much of the interpretive work.

observedTensions: The profile values roughness, but some rough candidates still need enough visual or structural evidence to avoid becoming mere incompletion.
consistencyNotes: The v0 deterministic run includes one repeat-trial note placeholder; real providers should record shuffled repeats here.

descriptiveComparisonMetrics.rankCorrelationNotes: No cross-curator provider trials have run yet; overlap metrics remain zeroed placeholders.
charterChoiceContradictionNotes: Provider-backed repeat trials are required before judging order sensitivity.

knownWeaknesses: Local deterministic initiation is not a substitute for provider-backed behavior.
